raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a pair of sneakers from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and received the wrong size. I then sent the sneakers back and they were delivered per the tracking number. I did not see the refund on my credit card statement, so I opened a dispute with Citi Bank ( my CC provider ). 

About a week later I saw the refund pending on my account, so I cancelled the dispute. A day later the pending credit disappeared. Now Citi is telling me there is nothing they can do since the dispute was cancelled. It was only cancelled because I saw the credit pending back on my account. 

I have asked the merchant for proof of the return and have yet to receive a response. The communication before that they told me to resolve with my bank.
